creator: lynx.ripe@gmail.com
text:
After updating ports on 2011-07-14 and following this UPDATING note:

20110711:
  AFFECTS: users of devel/icu
..
  portmaster -r icu

I observe repeatable problem during the build of editors/libreoffice (currently installed version 3.3.3, trying to build 3.3.3_1). One of the complete build logs is:

https://sites.google.com/site/lynxripe/freebsd/pr/20110715-libreoffice/110715_1319

 There is nothing relevant in dmesg output (no abnormal process terminations, no disk overflows etc).

 Variable settings which may be relevant:

/etc/make.conf:

PERL_VERSION=5.12.4

/usr/local/etc/ports.conf:

*/*:			WITHOUT_GNOMEVFS | WITHOUT_HAL
shells/bash:		WITH_STATIC_BASH
mail/*:			WITH_SSL_AND_PLAINTEXT
mail/sendmail*:		SENDMAIL_WITH_SHARED_MILTER | SENDMAIL_WITH_TLS
multimedia/transcode:	WITH_OPTIMIZED_CFLAGS | WITH_AVIFILE | WITH_QUICKTIME | WITH_FAME | WITH_XVID | WITH_LZO | WITH_DIVX5
print/ghostscript*:	A4
textproc/aspell:	WITHOUT_DICTEN
x11/Terminal:		WITHOUT_DBUS
devel/subversion:	WITH_MOD_DAV_SVN
www/apache2*:		WITH_SUEXEC | SUEXEC_DOCROOT=/usr/local
databases/mysql*-*:	WITH_XCHARSET=all
lang/php*:		WITH_MAILHEAD | WITH_APACHE | WITHOUT_CGI
databases/py-postgresql:PYTHON_VERSION=python3.2
lang/python-doc-pdf-a4: PYTHON_VERSION=python2.7
www/py-httplib2:	PYTHON_VERSION=python3.2

Previous version of the port (3.3.3) was built 2011-06-22 w/o problems with these settings (except that Perl version was 5.12.3).
